description: You are a digital distribution coordinator preparing a 4-track EP for release. Measure the integrated loudness (LUFS) of the master tracks in /home/ga/Music/ep_masters/ and normalize them to meet the specifications (Target LUFS, format, bitrate, and sample rate) found in /home/ga/Documents/platform_loudness_specs.json for Spotify, Apple Music, and YouTube Music. Save the normalized files in /home/ga/Music/normalized_delivery/ using subdirectories 'spotify/', 'apple/', and 'youtube/'. Produce a JSON compliance report at /home/ga/Documents/loudness_compliance_report.json documenting the original, target, and achieved LUFS for every track on every platform using the structure from the specs document.
